{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = Steward’s seal
| introduced = Of Killers and Kings
}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The [[Steward]]'s seal is used on letters of authorization.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c20">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 20</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Of Killers and Kings]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire artifacts]]
